'''shazhasa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:rabicano|rabicano]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-zh-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rabicano|rabicano]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| shazhasa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæzhæsæth|shæzhæsæth]] || [[word:shæzhæsæj|shæzhæsæj]] || [[word:shæzhæsæsh|shæzhæsæsh]] || [[word:shæzhæsæ|shæzhæsæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:shazhazhasath|shazhazhasath]] || [[word:shazhazhasaj|shazhazhasaj]] || [[word:shazhazhasash|shazhazhasash]] || [[word:shazhazhasa|shazhazhasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:shazhasath|shazhasath]] || [[word:shazhasaj|shazhasaj]] || [[word:shazhasash|shazhasash]] || [[word:shazhasa|shazhasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:shazhafsath|shazhafsath]] || [[word:shazhafsaj|shazhafsaj]] || [[word:shazhafsash|shazhafsash]] || [[word:shazhafsaf|shazhafsaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shazhasatha|shazhasatha]] || [[word:shazhasaja|shazhasaja]] || [[word:shazhasasha|shazhasasha]] || [[word:shazhasaka|shazhasaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shazhasath|shazhasath]] || [[word:shazhasaj|shazhasaj]] || [[word:shazhasash|shazhasash]] || [[word:shazhasa|shazhasa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shazhasathal|shazhasathal]] || [[word:shazhasajal|shazhasajal]] || [[word:shazhasashal|shazhasashal]] || [[word:shazhasakal|shazhasakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shazhasathatha|shazhasathatha]] || [[word:shazhasajaja|shazhasajaja]] || [[word:shazhasashasha|shazhasashasha]] || [[word:shazhasaka|shazhasaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shazhasathan|shazhasathan]] || [[word:shazhasajan|shazhasajan]] || [[word:shazhasashan|shazhasashan]] || [[word:shazhasakan|shazhasakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shazhasathaoro|shazhasathaoro]] || [[word:shazhasajaoro|shazhasajaoro]] || [[word:shazhasashaoro|shazhasashaoro]] || [[word:shazhasakaoro|shazhasakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
